body: Hi {business_name} - William from Marceau Solutions (239-398-5676). I see you only have {review_count} Google reviews. I'll show you a free system to get 10+ reviews this month. Want it? Text YES. Reply STOP to opt out.
notes: PHASE 1 OPTIMIZATION: Free system (no fake social proof)

variants.body: Quick question {business_name}: Ready to get 20+ Google reviews in 30 days? I'll set up the automated system for free. William, Marceau Solutions (239-398-5676). Text YES or call. Reply STOP to opt out.

Hi {business_name} - {review_count} reviews is low. Customers skip businesses under 20 reviews. I'll help you get there free. No strings. William, Marceau Solutions (239) 398-5676. Text YES. Reply STOP to opt out.
